summary: App with Trip History, Summary page, and Daily Page features. Timezone fix needed to use Indian Standard Time (IST, UTC+5:30) throughout the app, specifically on the Daily Page checkbox which selects a day ahead instead of the current date.
architectural_notes: All date/time logic should use Indian Standard Time (IST, UTC+5:30) throughout the application
known_issues: Daily Page checkbox selects a day ahead due to missing IST timezone offset

existing_features.title: Fix the 'Mark all travellers for today (AM & PM)' checkbox on the Daily Page (DailyParticipationGrid.tsx) so that 'today' is determined using Indian Standard Time (IST, UTC+5:30) instead of UTC. Any call to get the current date (e.g., `new Date()`) used for this checkbox's logic must apply a +5:30 offset to produce the correct IST date string (YYYY-MM-DD key format).

Audit all other usages of `new Date()` (or equivalent) across the frontend where today's date is derived and displayed or used as a default value (e.g., default date in payment forms, expense forms, OtherPendingAmountForm, CashPaymentForm, DateRangePicker defaults, auto-toll date logic). Ensure every such usage also applies the IST (UTC+5:30) offset so the displayed or pre-filled date is always the correct current date in India.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix Daily Page 'Mark all travellers for today' checkbox to use Indian Standard Time (IST, UTC+5:30) so it selects the correct current date instead of a day ahead
